response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with ~19 years across fullstack, backend, and platform work, including strong recent alignment with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and directly relevant AI-agent/MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. Demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and testing advocacy fit the quality-focused culture. Gaps are mostly secondary: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright experience, though adjacent skills suggest a fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React experience in recent production roles, matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent development and MCP tooling experience, a required and rare skill
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks authorship, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being a primary framework
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated/limited for secondary backend services
Testing tools named in JD (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly evidenced, though Selenium and D test tooling are
